examples: If the company was to relocate, most employees would move.
It is not economically practical to close or relocate the factories.
These beavers do know how to build dams, and do so if the need arises, as may occur if they are forced to relocate after felling and consuming all nearby trees.
Just as important is a willingness to limit or relocate urban and industrial expansion.
When the others dropped out of Harvard to relocate to California, Saverin stayed behind.
